events.label: assistant
events.text:
Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`.

**Summary:** Slope angle doesn't match the tabulated max allowable slope for the actual/classified soil type (OSHA 1926.652, Appendix A & B) — a direct cave-in hazard. Decision: **fail**, risk: **critical**. Required immediate actions: pull workers out and barricade the trench, have a competent person re-classify the soil, re-cut the slope to the correct angle (or install shoring/shielding as an alternative), and re-inspect before allowing re-entry.
